canonical_note: Canonicals auto-absolute from metadataBase. DO NOT change.
apply_notes: Update city data by slug. metaTitle_raw (template adds brand, keep raw<=40). meta_description<=160. ADD meta_keywords (local seller-intent). Trim any desc>160. Do NOT touch canonical. Preserve Turkish.
